result.finding: Spring Boot 2.7.18 application with embedded Apache Tomcat 9.x (Servlet 4.0 / Java EE 8). Packaged as a self-contained JAR with no external application server required. No container-specific configuration or web.xml present.
evidence: pom.xml: <packaging>jar</packaging> — fat JAR deployment, not WAR
Spring Boot 2.7.18 → embedded Tomcat 9.0.x → Servlet API 4.0 (javax.servlet namespace)
No WEB-INF/web.xml found (annotation-based configuration, not deployment descriptor)
No container-specific config files: no weblogic.xml, jboss-web.xml, glassfish-web.xml
No custom servlet or filter implementations (uses Spring MVC DispatcherServlet auto-configured by Spring Boot)
No @WebServlet, @WebFilter, or @WebListener annotations in source code
values: No container-specific features or vendor lock-in
